calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"sed -n '1,260p' .github/prompts/predict.md && printf '\\n---AGENTS---\\n' && sed -n '1,320p' AGENTS.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281681 --event evt-petition-disposition && sed -n '1,280p' schemas/prediction.schema.json && printf '\\n--- TOOLING SCHEMA ---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && printf '\\n--- FLAGS SCHEMA ---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281681 --event evt-petition-disposition; sed -n '1,320p' schemas/prediction.schema.json; printf '\\n--- TOOLING SCHEMA ---\\n'; sed -n '1,300p' schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json; printf '\\n--- FLAGS SCHEMA ---\\n'; sed -n '1,300p' schemas/agent_flags.schema.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.outp

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"find data/cases/scotus/73281681 -maxdepth 7 -type f -print | sort; printf '\\n--- CASE DIRS ---\\n'; find data/cases/scotus/73281681 -maxdepth 5 -type d -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate by salience|relist|CVSG|originating circuit|fee class|Paid|state court|New York|2025 Term|2024 Term\" metrics/statpack.md | head -n 160","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":12000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({"cmd":"jq 'keys' metrics/statpack.json; jq '.. | objects | select(has(\"term\")) | select(.term==\"2025\" or .term==2025)' metrics/statpack.json | head -n 240","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);
